artPrompt: An ongoing scene of grim charity: a folding table draped in white cloth bears tiered casseroles and pies under a looming clock tower, ashen-robed figures arranging the spread by guttering candlelight beneath a blood-dark sky. Cold-gold halos catch the steam rising from the dishes. One warm light source pools on the offered food, smoke and ash drifting at the edges, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: The Great Tribulation Bake Sale
text:
Whenever a snack is eaten at the table, you gain 2 life and may remove a doom counter from the Doomsday Clock. Fundraising for the end times goes surprisingly well.
{3}, {T}: Create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.")
flavorText: All proceeds go toward a future that, per the flyer, will not exist.
